About.Title: DevOps Lead & AI-Augmented Architect with 15+ years driving platform scalability, legacy modernization and accelerated delivery across Latin America.
About.Description: From CTO & Co-Founder to DevOps Lead at high-growth startups operating across Colombia, Mexico and Brazil. I orchestrate the full SDLC, lead monolith-to-microservices migrations and leverage AI-Assisted Development (Claude Code, Cursor) to multiply team velocity on critical Backend and Cloud deliverables without sacrificing stability or quality.

ServicesSection.title: Core Competencies
ServicesSection.text0: Production infrastructure on GCP and AWS with Docker, Kubernetes and Terraform. CI/CD pipelines and multi-country deployments with high availability.
ServicesSection.text1: AI-Assisted workflows with Claude Code and Cursor accelerating delivery by 60%. Agentic pipelines for code generation, review and deployment.
ServicesSection.text2: Monolith-to-NestJS migrations (from LoopBack 3) with saga patterns, event-driven systems (Pub/Sub) and progressive decoupling without downtime.
